title: Login with correct email and wrong password does not show error message
summary: When a user submits the login form with a valid email and an incorrect password, the expected error message 'Invalid email or password.
description: The application fails to show any failure feedback when a wrong password is entered with a valid email, violating the acceptance criteria that requires a visible error message on failed login attempts. This means users receive no indication that their credentials are wrong, which is both a security and usability concern. The success scenario (correct credentials) passes correctly, confirming the issue is isolated to the failure handling path.
expected_result: The error message 'Invalid email or password.' is displayed on the page.
actual_result: No error message is shown; the element 'Invalid email or password.' is not found in the DOM after submitting with wrong credentials.
